description: Agent ownership domains bound to real paths. Parallel implementer work is only allowed across non-overlapping domains. No domain grants a global change-everything mandate; engine-integration paths are highest risk and require CODEOWNER review.

core-data-io.description: Core gaussian data types, loaders/importers, and on-disk serialization. The streaming/residency/VRAM files under core/ belong to streaming-lod (more specific) and are R2, not R1 — assign those there.

renderer-resources.description: GPU resources and the render pipeline.

shaders-contracts.description: GLSL/compute shaders and the host/shader layout contract.

streaming-lod.description: Streaming, residency, VRAM, and level-of-detail (matches the R2 core-streaming paths in policy.json).

editor-import.description: Editor integration and import UX for the module.

tests-ci.description: Test harness, CI scripts, and agentic tooling.

engine-integration.description: Godot engine delta outside the module (highest risk, CODEOWNER review required).
